name: codegraph_get_symbol_info
description: Gets quick metadata about any symbol (function, class, variable, type). USE WHEN: you need to quickly understand what a symbol is, check its signature, or see usage count. FASTER than codegraph_get_ai_context when you only need basic info. Returns: name, kind, signature, visibility, file path, line range, and properties (is_async, is_static, etc.). Set includeReferences=true to also get all reference locations (slower). Requires uri and line parameters.

includeReferences.description: Whether to include all references to the symbol. Can be slow on large workspaces.

uri.description: The file URI containing the symbol (e.g. file:///Users/me/project/src/main.rs)
